description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5 Docker image with mysql:latest, redis:latest and postgres:latest services and a cache of vendor/ruby. Define a default test stage for three jobs (rails, rspec, rubocop) that all run the before_script steps ruby -v, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, and bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, then execute their specific scripts: rails runs rails db:migrate, rails db:seed and rails test with a DATABASE_URL variable pointing to the postgres service; rspec runs rspec spec; rubocop runs rubocop. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage with environment production that runs gem install dpl and dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APP_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_KEY, and set POSTGRES_DB variable for the database service.
